name: Casa Teresa

identity.notes: Official Casa Teresa pages identify the assigned Washington DC restaurant at 919 19th Street NW. Linked Jamón Jamón and Brasa pages are separate concepts at 1850 K Street and were not merged.

restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.claim: Official menu warns that consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase foodborne illness risk and asks guests to inform servers of dietary restrictions or allergies; it does not provide an allergen matrix or cross-contact guarantees.

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

products.name: Ensalada Mixta de Toda la Vida
Croquetas de Pollo
notes: Official menu title/description says chicken fritters; no milk claim retained from this surface because béchamel is not stated.

products.name: Croquetas de Setas
notes: Official menu says creamy mushroom fritters; no milk claim retained because milk is not literal in this surface.
Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Current official Casa Teresa menu publishes food items including oysters, anchovies, shrimp cocktail, grilled dishes, salads, vegetables, and fries.
Current official Casa Teresa Tapas Bar menu publishes food items including tapas, boards, tinned seafood, and nonalcoholic menu context; vermouth and wine sections are excluded from the POC catalog.
Official linked drinks menu publishes a Sin Alcohol section with tea, de-alcoholized sangria, lemonade, mineral water, sodas, and Mexican Coke.
Frozen baseline food menu artifact was compared with the current official July menu; retained as reconciliation evidence.
Frozen baseline Vermut menu lists alcoholic vermouth products; these are out of POC food/nonalcoholic scope and not current products.
Official Casa Teresa site identifies the Casa Teresa restaurant and links its current menu, Tapas Bar, Jamón Jamón, and Brasa pages.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: recompute Ingredient Intelligence after direct finalization
